channel.title: Forest comment alerts: Nitinat
channel.description: Forest Operations Map blocks around Nitinat with an open public comment period.

item.title: Nitinat: block 961214 open until 2026-07-24
item.description: Nitinat area. Planned 2026-08-15. proposed for logging. Comment closes 2026-07-24. Area: Nitinat.
